root_cause_hypothesis: Environment/fixture blocker, not a model or tool failure. The case instruction requires the service to select from the fixture table ConDemoNoteHeader, which does not exist anywhere in K:/AosService/PackagesLocalDirectory (verified: absent from the Contoso source model, absent from every other package via a full recursive scan, and get_object_info(table) reports 'not found via bridge, symbol index, or on disk'). All 3 compiler errors are a single cascade from that one missing type. Everything else the case exercises compiled and validated clean: both DataContract classes, the AxService and the AxServiceGroup passed xppc 'Metadata: validate services' and 'validate service groups' with zero diagnostics, and the generated XML matches the documented shape (AxService: Name/Class/ExternalName/ServiceOperations with AxServiceOperation Name+Method; AxServiceGroup: AutoDeploy=Yes + Services/AxServiceGroupService Name+Service). Two secondary findings: (a) the VM-free scorer crashes with a raw ENOENT scandir on eval/goldens/L3-custom-service-basic instead of degrading gracefully for a golden_pending case, so no golden diff could be produced; (b) xppc flags SysEntryPointAttribute as deprecated in AX7 while get_knowledge(topic='custom services') states every externally callable operation MUST carry it, with no mention of the deprecation warning. Also worth noting: validate_code(mode='references') reported the genuinely-missing ConDemoNoteHeader at the same warning severity as the two sibling classes created later in the same run, so the static gate could not have caught this blocker before the 3-minute build.
suggested_fix_area: 1) Deploy the ConDemoNoteHeader fixture (definition in eval/goldens/L1-form-basic/ConDemoNoteHeader.metadata.xml) into the Contoso sandbox as a pre-run fixture step, or make the L3 case self-contained by having it create the table. 2) src/eval/oracle/cli.ts listGoldenArtifacts (line 66): handle a missing golden directory / golden_pending:true by reporting golden_match=null instead of throwing ENOENT. 3) Knowledge base 'custom services': note that SysEntryPointAttribute raises a deprecation warning on current platform builds and state whether it remains the recommended pattern. 4) validate_code(mode='references'): consider distinguishing 'unknown type that is also not a pending sibling in this session' from ordinary forward references. 5) Capture the golden for this case once the fixture exists.
evidence_refs: npm run eval:score -- L3-custom-service-basic --actual-dir ... -> ENOENT scandir eval/goldens/L3-custom-service-basic
